mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, signature_image_url, signature_hash, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM user_signature WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, signature_image_url, signature_hash, is_default, create_time, update_time FROM user_signature WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC, create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE user_signature SET is_default = 0, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = 1
